name: Curtsy Lunge
instructions: Stand with feet hip‑width apart. Step one foot back and across behind the other leg, as if doing a curtsy. Bend both knees to lower into a lunge, keeping your hips facing forward. Your front knee should stay over the ankle. Push through the front heel to return to start. Alternate legs.
form_cues: Front knee tracks over second toe
safety_notes: This exercise challenges the lateral hip muscles. If you feel knee stress, shorten the step range. Use bodyweight until you master balance. Do not let the front knee collapse inward.
